checks.check: python -m pytest agents/eval/test_graphrag_baseline.py -v (live Ollama reachable: llama3.1:8b)
checks.detail: 21/21 passed (9 pure-unit, 6 stub-client, 6 live-local). Re-ran 3x total to check for flakiness on the live-Ollama tier -- reproducible each time. Initial implementation had 2 real bugs caught by this self-consistency pass and fixed before commit: (1) the original entity-extraction prompt returned an empty JSON array for short question-style queries with no formal proper nouns -- fixed by broadening the prompt to explicitly request noun-phrase concepts/topics too, with a worked example, and an instruction that empty-array responses should be rare; (2) the heuristic fallback's capitalized-run regex picked up sentence-initial 'The' as part of an entity (e.g. 'The Security Team') -- fixed by stripping known sentence-leading stopwords from multi-word heuristic candidates.
